summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification for 10 open PR candidates plus one hydrated security-sensitive linked PR. No shared canonical was selected because the job is explicitly an inventory shard. One open PR is boringly superseded by a merged hydrated PR; the rest should stay open for maintainer review, proof, repair, or normal independent handling. No GitHub mutations were performed.

actions.reason: Viable related fix candidate, but merge is blocked by job frontmatter and maintainer review requirements.
Keep open as related work needing proof; not safe to close or merge.
Independent feature PR with active technical review state; leave for maintainer/author workflow.
A merged hydrated PR already covers the same root cause more completely; planned close preserves a reopen path.
Independent feature PR; leave open for normal maintainer review rather than inventory closeout.
Related provider-format fix candidate needing proof; keep open.
Related message-lifecycle work with unresolved proof/product scope; do not close as duplicate.
Related fix candidate, but current branch/validation state blocks any merge or fixed-by closeout.
Independent focused feature/fix candidate; leave open for normal maintainer review.
Related canonical contributor path for the Feishu issue, but proof/check blockers prevent closeout or merge planning.
Scoped quarantine for the exact security-sensitive linked PR; unrelated non-security candidates were still classified.
